rationale: Gov't Code §2306.117 governs housing finance division expenses and debt authority. It is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount and imposes no constraint on that exemption level.
quote: The expenses incurred in carrying out the functions of the housing finance division may be paid only from revenues or funds provided under this chapter.
_note: No conflict identified; the rule addresses housing finance division fiscal operations, not property tax exemptions.
